name: @forwardimpact/libstorage
description: Pluggable file storage — local, S3, or Supabase behind a single interface.
author: D. Olsson <hi@senzilla.io>

jobs.trigger: Realizing the knowledge an agent reads has to live somewhere, and that hard-coding local file paths means a move to S3 or Supabase rewrites every reader.
jobs.bigHire: persist and retrieve agent context behind one interface, whatever the backend.
jobs.littleHire: swap local, S3, or Supabase storage without changing a line of consumer code.
jobs.competesWith: raw fs calls scattered across consumers; coupling code to a single cloud SDK; a bespoke storage wrapper per project
